role: Defines all JSON Schema specifications for the ArchSpine mirror system, covering project units, folder units, manifests, rules, and shared types.
responsibility: Provides the formal structural definitions and validation rules that ensure consistency across all ArchSpine configuration and metadata files, enabling automated indexing, synchronization, and enforcement of clean architecture boundaries.

children.role: This directory contains example template files that define the schema and rules for the ArchSpine repository indexing and mirror system.
Defines reusable type definitions and validation constraints for the ArchSpine shared schema.
Defines the structural schema for a SpineFolderUnit, ensuring each folder unit in the ArchSpine mirror system adheres to a consistent format.
Schema for the ArchSpine SpineManifest configuration file, which records synchronization state and file-level indexing metadata for the mirror system.
Defines the structure and metadata for a SpineProjectUnit, a core component of the ArchSpine mirror system that describes a project's modules and their responsibilities.
Defines the formal schema for SpineRule documents within ArchSpine, enabling consistent validation and enforcement of architectural or behavioral policies.

Schema definition for ArchSpine SpineUnit configuration files. This JSON Schema validates the structure of each unit record in the mirror system, ensuring that every spine-unit file conforms to a standardized format.
